name: Chicken and Broccoli Quiche
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces chopped broccoli, cooked 3 minutes & drained
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake pie shell for 6 minutes. Reduce heat to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Arrange broccoli with chicken and cheese in baked shell. Beat eggs with milk, onion, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Pour over broccoli and chicken. Bake for 50 minutes. Cool for 10-15 minutes.
